problem: How to store solar energy at grid scale without chemical battery degradation?
hypothesis: If Spintronics for low-power data storage is applied to chemical, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Calorimetric measurement with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
